scripts.build:model: blender --background gpt-5.6-sol-ultra/cozy_forest_cabin.blend --python scripts/build_web_model.py && gltf-transform optimize site/assets/models/sol-ultra-diorama.glb site/assets/models/sol-ultra-diorama.optimized.glb --compress meshopt --texture-compress false && node scripts/finalize_web_model.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:model && npm run build:viewer
